ElasticNetworkCardUpdatesRegularSecurity.eniId: The ID of the elastic network interface
ElasticNetworkCardUpdatesRegularSecurity.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of no more than 64 characters. For details, see [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
ElasticNetworkCardUpdatesRegularSecurity.securityGroupIds: List of regular security group IDs
